bangla: খুব যত্নবান ও খুঁটিনাটি বিষয়ে মনোযোগী
example: For the IELTS writing task, _______ planning can significantly improve your band score.
Smartphones have become so _______ that even remote villages use mobile payments.
During the interview, employers expect candidates to propose _______ solutions to practical problems.
The new policy aims to _______ traffic congestion in the city center.

bangla: সহনশীল ও দ্রুত ঘুরে দাঁড়াতে সক্ষম
example: A _______ economy is better able to recover from unexpected shocks.
Examiners will closely _______ your essay for coherence and evidence.
To score well, present a _______ argument with clear supporting points.
The board requested a cost-effective and _______ plan that fits the budget.
Provide a _______ explanation so readers can follow your reasoning easily.
The study describes an _______ system of interrelated factors.
A _______ researcher publishes several high-quality papers each year.
To _______ risk, the bank diversified its loan portfolio.
A _______ student practices vocabulary consistently every day.

bangla: সবচেয়ে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ বা চোখে পড়ার মতো
example: In your summary, emphasize the most _______ findings first.
During revision week, _______ your notes into a single, concise guide.
Successful learners are _______ in practice and do not give up.
The report highlights the _______ in educational access across regions.
An _______ analyst quickly identifies emerging market trends.
Ensuring user privacy is _______ when designing digital services.
To meet the deadline, the team used automation to _______ the review process.
